nasb.text: Ephraim surrounds Me with lies And the house of Israel with deceit; Judah is also unruly against God, Even against the Holy One who is faithful.

esv.text: Ephraim has surrounded me with lies, and the house of Israel with deceit, but Judah still walks with God and is faithful to the Holy One.

cnv.text: 以法蓮用虛謊， 以色列家用詭詐包圍著我； 猶大還是與　神對抗， 就是對抗那可信可靠的至聖者。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “以法莲用谎话包围我， 以色列家用诡诈环绕我； 犹大依然背离圣洁、信实的上帝。
